Readings

Week Topic Readings
Week 1 09/22/21 Wed, 09/22 Introduction
09/24/21 Fri, 09/24 Intro to Hardware and Software
  1. Charles Severance Ch1: Intro to Computing. Python for Everybody
    reading • video
  2. Brian Heinold Ch1: Getting Started. A Practical Introduction to Python Programming
Week 2 09/27/21 Mon, 09/27 The Building Blocks
  1. Severance Ch2: Variables.
    reading • video
  2. Heinold Ch2: Variables.
09/29/21 Wed, 09/29 Intro to Lists & Tuples
  1. Severance Ch9: Lists.
    reading • video
  2. Severance Ch10: Tuples.
    reading • video
10/01/21 Fri, 10/01 Introduction to Functions
  1. Severance Ch4: Functions.
    reading • video
  2. Heinold Ch4: Functions.
Week 3 10/04/21 Mon, 10/04 Creating Your Own Functions
10/06/21 Wed, 10/06 Creating Your Own Functions: Part 2
10/08/21 Fri, 10/08 Modules and Variable Scope
  1. Heinold Ch12: Modules.
    Skim sections 12.1 through 12.4.
Week 4 10/11/21 Mon, 10/11 Modules & Variable Scope (Continued)
10/13/21 Wed, 10/13 Quiz Review: Expressions
10/15/21 Fri, 10/15 Quiz 1
Week 5 10/18/21 Mon, 10/18 Conditional Execution & Boolean Logic
  1. Severance Ch3: Conditionals.
    reading • video
  2. Ch5: Conditionals. ThinkCS
10/20/21 Wed, 10/20 While Loops
  1. Severance Ch5: Iteration.
    reading • video
  2. Ch7: Iteration. ThinkCS
10/22/21 Fri, 10/22 More Practice: While Loops & If Statements
Week 6 10/25/21 Mon, 10/25 For Loops
10/27/21 Wed, 10/27 More Practice with For Loops & Sequences
10/29/21 Fri, 10/29 User Inputs & Events
Week 7 11/01/21 Mon, 11/01 Working with the Terminal / Command Prompt
11/03/21 Wed, 11/03 Files and Strings
  1. Severance Ch6: Strings.
    reading • video
  2. Severance Ch7: Files.
    reading • video
11/05/21 Fri, 11/05 More on Files & Strings + Error Handling
Week 8 11/08/21 Mon, 11/08 Quiz 2
11/10/21 Wed, 11/10 More practice with files, strings, and error handling
11/12/21 Fri, 11/12 Dictionaries
  1. Severance Ch9: Dictionaries.
    reading • video
Week 9 11/15/21 Mon, 11/15 Activity: Working with Lists of Dictionaries from the Internet
11/17/21 Wed, 11/17 Activity: Downloading Internet Files
11/19/21 Fri, 11/19 Dictionary Algorithms
Week 10 11/22/21 Mon, 11/22 Dictionary Algorithms (Continued)
11/24/21 Wed, 11/24 Project 2 Preview (Zoom Lecture)
11/26/21 Fri, 11/26 Thanksgiving Break
Week 11 11/29/21 Mon, 11/29 Practice Manipulating Data: Yelp
12/01/21 Wed, 12/01 Practice Manipulating Data: Spotify
12/03/21 Fri, 12/03 Quiz 3
